description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that runs on push and pull request events. Use a matrix strategy to test on multiple Python versions from 3.5 to 3.12.0-rc.1 on ubuntu-20.04. For each version, check out the code, set up Python, install dependencies, run tests with coverage, and upload coverage artifacts. Additionally, use a separate ubuntu-latest job to download coverage artifacts, combine and annotate coverage reports, and display coverage results.
